revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[鳥取県]][[南部町 (鳥取県)|南部町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:なんふちよう}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|なんふちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物]]}} {{translated page|ja|Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物|version=92372878}} [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Tottori Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Nanbu, Tottori]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[ja:Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Kamo Shrine (Tottori Nanbu)]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Akaiwa Shrine]] [[sn:鳥取県南部町の建築物]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[鳥取県]][[南部町 (鳥取県)|南部町]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:なんふちよう}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|なんふちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物|version=92372878}}
[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[ja:Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Kamo Shrine (Tottori Nanbu)]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Akaiwa Shrine]] [[sn:鳥取県南部町の建築物]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
[[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Tottori Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Nanbu, Tottori]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:"

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] to [[Category:11]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:11]] (crud category cleanup)
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: tag with [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]] (has ja: interwiki, no Wikidata)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{デフォルトソート:なんふちよう}} {{座標一覧}} {{citation needed|なんふちよう}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物}} {{translated page|ja|Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物|version=92372878}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:鳥取県南部町の建築物]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Kamo Shrine (Tottori Nanbu)]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Akaiwa Shrine]] [[Category:sn_crud|TEST鳥取県南部町の建築物]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Tottori Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Nanbu, Tottori]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]
